summary: ANDROID | Language change - After succesful Lang change previous one is selected in settings, after second change unavailable dialog appears
scenario: Language selection in settings does not update after firmware update, and shows "Update currently not available" dialog until app restart
description_clean: After a successful language change via firmware update, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog saying "Update currently not available" appears. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device
Trigger a firmware update that includes a language change
After the firmware update completes successfully, go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings
Observe the language selection displayed in settings
Attempt to change the language to a different option
Close the app and restart Poly Studio Mobile
Navigate again to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and check the firmware version displayed
expected: After a successful firmware update with a new language, the language selection in settings should reflect the updated language. Changing the language should work without errors. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) should be displayed.
actual: After the firmware update, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language, a dialog appears saying "Update currently not available". After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
